text.style: fill: #198754; font: 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #212529; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #6c757d; font: italic 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #495057; font: 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: 【行为】传播前后伪造概率维持 0.99+，风险等级保持「中」，判定始终为「伪」。证据充分且一致——系统稳定放行，不引入额外不确定性。

text.style: fill: #dc3545; font: 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #212529; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #6c757d; font: italic 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #495057; font: 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif

g.text: 【行为】原始图像伪造概率 0.967 → Facebook 传播后骤降至 0.018，判定由「伪」翻转为「真」，风险等级从「中」降至「低」，可疑区域归零。

text.style: fill: #495057; font: 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif

g.text: 【关键】系统并未静默改判为真，而是同步降低置信度并触发转人工——证据不足时宁可转人工，不以低证据状态做出高置信判定。

text.style: fill: #fd7e14; font: 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #212529; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #6c757d; font: italic 9px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start
fill: #495057; font: 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif

g.text: 【行为】四平台伪造概率均远低于 0.5，全局判定为「真」，但局部模块持续检出 1 处可疑区域（篡改类型=局部篡改）。

text.style: fill: #495057; font: 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif

g.text: 【关键】系统保留全局与局部的证据分歧，不强行取一路覆盖另一路，转人工鉴定。

text.style: fill: #6c757d; font: italic 8.5px 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: 数据来源：case_summary.csv / case_classification/all.csv（真实系统输出）。可疑区域计数与篡改类型为工程定位证据，不等同于像素级真值标注。像素级定位指标见 experiments/localization/verified_results/。
